styles.name: maple_story_avatar（冒险岛角色精灵转换）
styles.summary: 将任意动漫/游戏/漫画角色转换为 **冒险岛（MapleStory）玩家精灵头像**，保持角色特征同时适配游戏角色比例和像素渲染风格。
features: **冒险岛角色比例**：2.0~2.3头身，头部+头发占 60~65%，躯干极小
**像素渲染质感**：低分辨率游戏精灵放大感，禁止精细像素/HD像素
**角色特征保留**：发型、发色、瞳色、服装、武器等核心特征必须保留
**纯白底正方形**：1080x1080，纯白背景，单角色居中
**图层规范**：Hair → Hat → Face Accessory → Top → Bottom → Shoes → Cape → Weapon
styles.prompt:
[角色设定]
你是一位将动漫、游戏、漫画角色转换为 MapleStory 玩家角色精灵的像素艺术总监。

[输入]
角色名称 + 全身图片（推荐正面全身照）

[任务]
1. 分析 {角色名} 的代表外型特征：
   - 发型
   - 发色
   - 眼睛颜色
   - 代表服装
   - 代表配饰
   - 代表武器
   - 代表象征元素
   - 代表配色
2. 在保留上述特征的前提下，重新解读为 MapleStory 玩家角色结构。
3. 成品必须看起来像真正的 MapleStory 玩家角色精灵，而非通用像素艺术角色。

[规格一：冒险岛角色结构规范]
- 整体比例：头部+头发 60~65% / 躯干 15~18% / 腿部 20~25%，2.0~2.3 头身
- 视角：35~45 度 Quarter View，双眼均可见，近乎平面 2D 精灵
- 脸部：眼睛位于脸部下方，间距宽，横宽扁平眼，大瞳孔+高光，禁止画鼻子，嘴极小，带柔和腮红
- 颈部：禁止表现颈部，头部直接连接身体
- 头发：角色核心标识，体积比头骨大很多，优先轮廓，最小化发丝表达，存在顶部高光
- 身体：躯干极小，手臂短，腿部短，简化圆柱形四肢，最小化关节表达
- 装备图层顺序：Hair → Hat → Face Accessory → Top → Bottom → Shoes → Cape → Weapon
- 姿态：Idle Standing Pose，禁止跳跃/战斗/动作表演

[规格二：像素渲染规范]
禁止风格：
- 高分辨率像素艺术
- Ultra Detailed Pixel Art
- HD Pixel Art
- 精细像素艺术

目标效果（32~64px 游戏精灵放大感）：
- Low-resolution game sprite
- Enlarged MMORPG sprite
- Chunky pixel structure
- Grid-aligned pixel art
- Visible pixel blocks
- Clean 1px outline
- Limited color palette
- Flat color shading
- Solid tone pixel blocks
- Minimal shading
- No dithering
- No smooth gradients
- No airbrush effects

[规格三：输出条件]
- Canvas Size: 1080 x 1080
- Format: Perfect Square
- Background: Pure White (#FFFFFF)
- 角色数量：仅单角色
- 可见范围：全身可见
- 构图：居中，角色占画布高度约 75%
- 禁止元素：裁剪、额外角色、宠物、场景、背景物品、地面、文字、Logo、水印、UI

[规格四：绝对禁止风格]
Pokemon Style / Terraria Style / Stardew Valley Style
Ragnarok Online Style / JRPG Battle Sprite / Octopath Traveler Style
Western Cartoon / Disney Style / Realistic / Semi Realistic
3D Render / Illustration / Concept Art / Splash Art / Poster / Wallpaper
Anime Illustration / Digital Painting / Cinematic Lighting
Ultra Detailed Sprite / High Definition Pixel Art / Fine-Grained Pixel Art
Smooth Gradient Shading / Airbrush Shading

[收尾]
Create {角色名} as a true MapleStory player avatar sprite.
The result must look like an actual MapleStory player character converted from {角色名},
not a generic pixel-art character.

variables.角色参考图: 参考图 + "保持角色一致性"
variables.IP形象: 参考图 + "保持角色一致性"

styles.name: 芒果椰乳涂鸦饮料海报
styles.summary: 明亮清透饮品摄影 + 粗黑手绘涂鸦标注，像随手课堂笔记一样的可爱手作感饮料海报。
features: **透明玻璃杯实拍感** — 杯壁透明、底部有小料和乳感基底，上方有柔软奶色云雾层 + 芒果浓缩色 + 冰块泡沫
**粗黑手绘涂鸦叠加** — 厚实松弛的黑色手写词、弧形箭头、短促放射线、虚线杯身轮廓标注，像随手课堂笔记
**浅色柔软背景** — 桌面与布料轻量支撑，远处虚化器皿和制作道具，不影响杯子视觉重量
**真实与手绘反差** — 实拍饮品质感 × 幼拙线描手写，形成可爱记忆点
styles.prompt:
生成一张{比例}的明亮清透饮品摄影图片。

主体是一杯真实的{饮品名称}冰饮，透明玻璃杯近距离实拍。杯壁透明、底部有{底部内容}和{基底质感}基底，上方有柔软的{顶部云雾层} + {风味浓缩色} + 冰块泡沫。

浅色柔软的{背景描述}生活化背景，桌面与布料轻量支撑，远处虚化的器皿和制作道具（不能抢走杯子视觉重量）。

将真实饮品与粗黑手绘信息涂鸦叠加：用厚实松弛的黑色手写词"{手写词}"、弧形箭头、短促放射线、虚线杯身轮廓标注，像随手课堂笔记一样的可爱手作感。

整体保持明亮清透、色阶清晰。不要暗淡色调，不要灰浊旧化，不要水印，不要真实Logo，不要复杂背景，不要衬线字体。

features: 黑色奢华轮廓造型
深翡翠绿点缀色

styles.prompt: Create a polished international luxury editorial poster in the Luxury Perspective Checkerboard Editorial style. Subject: {SUBJECT}. Action or presentation: {SUBJECT_ACTION}. Hero product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Location: {LOCATION}. Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Wardrobe and styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Typography: place the invented large script word "{MAIN_TEXT}" as an oversized sweeping background graphic behind the subject, and place the small uppercase editorial text "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" near the upper field; add the restrained accent symbol "{ACCENT_SYMBOL}" only once. Preserve these style fidelity anchors: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Avoid this source content: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Use a low-angle high-fashion photographic camera, crisp studio lighting, generous white space, a red-and-white checkerboard perspective plane, deep black structure, emerald or teal accent details, clean cutout subject edges, glossy premium material highlights, and sparse typography. Do not use any real brand logos, real fashion house names, monograms, watermarks, QR codes, social media UI, price labels, or copied campaign identities. Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

styles.name: Quiet Luxury Furniture Nameplate Poster Style
triggers: Quiet Luxury Furniture Nameplate Poster Style
styles.summary: A premium furniture editorial poster system with a warm off-white studio field, oversized deep forest-green display typography behind one realistic hero furniture object, sparse catalog microcopy, thin rules, outlined catalog chips, and a dark green rounded bottom information bar.
features: Warm off-white background with subtle paper softness and a faint studio floor gradient.
Oversized deep forest-green display typography sits behind the furniture and is partly obscured.
One hero furniture object dominates the lower-middle frame with realistic product-photography depth.
The furniture overlaps the rear display word, creating a clean layered poster hierarchy.
Thin dark green horizontal rule and small spaced navigation words sit near the top.
styles.prompt: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} luxury furniture editorial poster in the Quiet Luxury Furniture Nameplate Poster Style. Subject: {SUBJECT}. Position and spatial relationship: {SUBJECT_ACTION}. Product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Location: {LOCATION}. Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Large rear display text: {MAIN_TEXT}. Secondary catalog text: {SECONDARY_TEXT}. Accent symbol or chip: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Furniture material styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Style fidelity anchors to preserve: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Source content to avoid: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Build a warm off-white studio poster field with subtle paper softness, one oversized deep forest-green geometric sans display word behind the product, a thin top horizontal rule with small spaced catalog navigation words, compact lower-left microcopy, two small outlined catalog chips near the lower-right, and a dark green rounded product-information bar across the bottom. The furniture must be realistic, premium, materially detailed, softly shadowed, and large enough to overlap the rear typography. Keep the image sparse, refined, gallery-like, and brandless. Do not use real logos, watermarks, QR codes, app UI, price tags, or exact source text.

variables.`SUBJECT`: main furniture subject
variables.`SUBJECT_ACTION`: position, crop, and spatial relationship
variables.`PRODUCT_OR_PROP`: specific furniture product, material, or prop
variables.`LOCATION`: controlled studio or catalog poster setting
variables.`BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS`: minimal background details, rules, shadows, and graphic structure
variables.`MAIN_TEXT`: large rear display headline or category word

styles.name: 奢侈品牌刺绣微距
styles.summary: 如同品牌委托刺绣艺术家将Logo转化为线艺作品，用微距镜头捕捉每一根丝线的光泽与织物质感，呈现顶级纺织品摄影的真实感。
features: **极致微距纹理** — 3D几何刺绣线材，每根线是真实几何体投射真实阴影，非贴图模拟
**专业纺织布光** — 120cm巨大柔光箱从正上方平坦照明，无方向性阴影，临床级精准
**品牌色智能识别** — AI自动提取品牌代表性色作为主绣线色，默认深海军蓝 #1A2332
**多针法系统** — 缎纹绣（光泽面）、轮廓绣（曲线）、法式结粒绣（圆点）、尖刺元素（渐尖）
**物理真实感** — 华夫格针织面料位移几何、纤维微绒、刺绣凹凸阴影、衬线边缘光晕
**相机参数精准** — Canon EOS R5 / Nikon Z8 + 100mm微距镜头，f/8-f/11深景深，4:5竖版

styles.name: Luxury Birthday Poster Style
styles.summary: 米白纹理纸墙 + 3D 立体雕刻数字内嵌气球花卉 + 人物从数字中"伸出"的 3D 凸出效果 = 高端杂志封面色生日海报。
features: **构图**：3:4 竖版肖像构图
**背景**：米白色纹理纸墙，带细腻颗粒感
**核心元素**：墙上雕刻的 3D 立体数字
**数字内装饰**：粉色气球、白色花卉、奢牌花束
**人物**：穿米白 T 恤 + 粉色背带裤，自然笑容
**特效**：人物脸/肩/手/脚从数字中"伸出"，模拟 3D 凸出效果
**光效**：温暖电影感金色侧光 + 轮廓光
**排版**：墙上文字 `[NAME] CHAPTER [AGE] [AGE] 365 MORE DAYS OF WONDER`
**整体风格**：极简奢华编辑风、高端杂志封面质感
styles.prompt:
Professional luxury birthday poster, 3:4 portrait composition, ultra high-end studio photography aesthetic. Premium off-white textured paper wall background with subtle grain and depth.

A large number [AGE] is precisely carved into the wall with realistic thickness, beveled edges, and deep inner shadows creating strong 3D depth. Inside the number: soft pastel pink balloons, elegant white flowers, and luxury bouquet arrangement with minimal premium styling.

A happy [AGE]-year-old child with preserved facial identity, wearing a milky white T-shirt and pastel pink denim overalls, laughing naturally.

Face, shoulder, one hand, and one foot extend outside the carved number, creating a realistic 3D pop-out effect.

Warm cinematic golden sunlight from one side, soft rim light, ultra-realistic skin texture, studio-quality lighting, clean natural shadows, photorealistic rendering.

Typography on wall: [NAME] CHAPTER [AGE] [AGE] 365 MORE DAYS OF WONDER.

Minimal luxury editorial layout, high-end magazine cover style, perfect composition, soft contrast, natural colors, no distortions, no AI artifacts.

styles.name: Luxury Beauty Campaign Side Profile Poster
styles.summary: 高端美妆 campaign 的核心公式：近景侧面女性肖像 + 超大半透明衬线字体 + 红色手写体点缀 + 温暖逆光 = 干净、光泽、电影感的商业级大片。
features: **Close-up side-profile female portrait** — 近景侧面女性肖像作为画面主体
**Realistic skin texture** — 真实皮肤纹理，自然裸妆
**Warm reverse light** — 温暖逆光，营造光泽感
**Oversized translucent serif typography** — 超大半透明衬线字体
**One red handwritten script accent** — 一处红色手写体强调
**Minimal blurred background** — 极简模糊背景
**Small brand logo + slogan + copy** — 品牌 logo + 标语 + 正文 + 页脚细节
styles.prompt:
Prompt:

Create a single vertical 9:16 luxury beauty campaign poster.

Brand: [BRAND NAME]
Subtitle: [BRAND SUBTITLE]
Main title: [PROFILE / GLOW / VEIL / ECLAT]
Red script word: [refine / luminous / softly / timeless]
Slogan: [SHORT SLOGAN]
Main copy: [MAIN COPY]
Portrait angle: [left side profile / right side profile / semi-profile / lowered side profile]
Color palette: [cream beige / pearl white / champagne gold / misty rose / soft silver]
Key focus: [jawline / skin glow / neck / fragrance / pearl earring / collarbone]

Use a close-up side-profile female portrait with realistic skin texture, natural makeup, soft lips, elegant neck and collarbone, natural hair strands, and warm reverse light. Create a premium editorial beauty-ad look with a minimal blurred background, oversized translucent serif typography, one red handwritten script accent, small brand logo, slogan, main copy and footer details.

The image should feel like a high-end beauty, skincare, fragrance or jewelry campaign poster: clean, luminous, refined, cinematic and commercial-grade.

Avoid Chinese text, cheap promo style, plastic skin, distorted hands, repeated faces, messy text, cluttered background and overdone AI beauty retouching.

styles.name: 青柠薄荷涂鸦手绘饮料海报
styles.summary: 清爽青柠薄荷气泡饮 × 粗体标题广告节奏 × 手绘蜡笔线条托举杯底，真实与线描的反差记忆点。
features: **粗体标题+广告式节奏** — 画面上方大号粗体标题，字形紧凑笔触厚实字距打开，下方接一行或两行等宽说明文字，形成干净广告式节奏
**真实冰饮质感** — 玻璃杯边缘清晰，冰块通透高光，饮品有明显分层流动和透明层次
**手绘蜡笔托举杯底** — 杯子下方用粗颗粒手绘线条画出一只托举饮品的手，线条来自主题饮品结构色，边缘带蜡笔粉笔般的干燥颗粒
**两侧短句+稀疏排版** — 主体周围大量通风感留白，两侧短句式信息文字像产品洞察，对齐克制
**真实×线描反差** — 真实拍摄饮品质感与幼拙线描手绘之间的反差记忆点
styles.prompt:
围绕{饮品名称}生成一张清爽、明亮、带轻微手作感的{比例}饮料视觉。

画面上方用大号粗体标题"{主标题}"建立第一阅读层级，字形紧凑、笔画厚实、字距打开，下方接一行或两行更小的等宽说明文字"{说明文字}"，形成干净的广告式节奏。

主体是一杯真实拍摄质感的冰饮，放在画面中部偏下的位置。玻璃杯边缘清晰，冰块通透高光，饮品有明显{分层描述}的液体分层、流动和透明层次，{风味颜色}颜色集中在杯口和上层，浅色液体作为大面积清透基底。

主体周围保留大量通风感留白，两侧放置"{两侧文字}"短句式信息文字，像产品洞察而不是装饰说明，排版稀疏、对齐克制。

杯子下方用粗颗粒的手绘线条画出一只托举饮品的手，线条来自{结构色}，边缘带蜡笔粉笔般的干燥颗粒，手掌以夸张轮廓承托杯底，形成真实饮品与幼拙线描之间的反差记忆点。局部加入一小块{强调色}暖色强调，面积很小，只服务于节奏和视线停顿。

色彩从饮品自身的材料、风味和情绪中提取：背景保持{背景色}高明度、干净、轻微暖意的结构场。整体保持明亮轻快、清透新鲜，色阶清晰，饱和度集中在饮品和少量强调处。

底部放置一个极简小标识"{标识文字}"，尺寸克制，作为收口。

不要灰旧浑浊、不要厚重阴影、不要衬线字体、不要水印、不要真实Logo、不要卡通风。

styles.name: 韩国 ins 风晨间问候海报
styles.summary: 清透明亮的晨间仪式感图文，主体在有机圆角窗口内，弧线文字围绕，韩国 ins 风治愈画面。
features: **有机圆角窗口** — 主体以近距离局部放大呈现，放入边角圆润、底部略有柔和起伏的窗口中，窗口外保留大面积干净留白与细腻纸质肌理
**前后层次** — 前景略虚化，中景最清晰，后景被柔光和透明材质轻轻压住；半透明包裹层从画面一侧斜向掠过并遮挡部分主体
**极简排版** — 上方纤细数字日期，局部文字沿弧线轻轻围绕主体，底部大号中文短句 + 紧凑英文标题 + 小段说明文字，字重从细到粗形成阅读顺序
**色彩系统** — 大面积高明度低杂质底色 + 主题柔和主色 + 强调色只在焦点附近出现，深色只承担信息和轮廓功能
**晨光包裹感** — 半透明包裹层、纸张层或薄膜层斜向掠过，形成被晨光包裹的轻盈感
styles.prompt:
围绕{主题}生成一张清透、明亮、带晨间仪式感的{比例}图文画面。

主体影像占据视觉中心，以近距离局部放大呈现，放入一个边角圆润、底部略有柔和起伏的有机窗口中，窗口外保留大面积干净留白与细腻纸质肌理。

主题对象内部要有前后层次：前景略虚化，中景最清晰，后景被柔光和透明材质轻轻压住。加入由主题派生的半透明包裹层、纸张层或薄膜层，让它从画面一侧斜向掠过并遮挡部分主体，形成被晨光包裹的轻盈感。

画面信息以极简排版组织：上方或边缘放置{日期文字}纤细数字日期，{主题关键词}文字沿弧线轻轻围绕主体，底部设置大号中文短句"{主标题}"、紧凑英文标题"{英文标题}"和"{说明文字}"小段说明文字，字重从细到粗形成清楚阅读顺序。辅以一两条细线椭圆轨迹和小型星芒符号制造轻微律动。

色彩从主题自身的材质、季节和情绪中提取：大面积底色保持{底色}高明度、低杂质、通风感，主体使用清晰而柔和的{主题色}主题色，{强调色}强调色只在焦点与文字附近小面积出现，深色只承担信息和轮廓功能。整体保持明亮轻快、干净清透、色阶清晰，纸感只是细腻背景触感。

最终效果像一张安静但有呼吸感的日常问候图文，摄影质感与平面排版自然融合，主体窗口、弧形文字、细线轨迹和留白共同构成第一眼记忆点。

不要脏灰旧化，不要暗淡色调，不要衬线字体，不要水印，不要真实Logo，不要卡通风，不要复杂背景。

styles.name: 韩国插画风（Korean Illustration Style）
styles.summary: 韩国插画线条涂色 × 自然手绘感 × 春天柔和粉彩色调 × 温馨治愈场景 = 韩系插画风格。
features: 韩国插画风格，线条画 + 涂色

Maintain consistency with the reference character

styles.name: 金政基赛博朋克素描
styles.summary: 金政基式超写实线条 × 赛博朋克极繁构图 × 混乱中暗藏秩序 = 科幻叙事素描。
features: 金政基风格：硬朗精准的线条艺术
超写实细节 + 超现实场景融合

styles.prompt: 超写实细节与超现实场景融合，完美透视关系，动态构图，画面布满大量赛博朋克风格的人物、机械、复古风格日常物件，科幻，复古未来主义，混乱中暗藏秩序，多色彩，硬朗精准的线条艺术，充满叙事感，极繁主义，神秘感，不对称构图，细节完美，高品质细节，超高清分辨率，笔触清晰，强烈光影对比，金政基风格。

styles.name: K-ギャル 街头抓拍风
styles.summary: 将真人照片变成韩系街头抓拍风——活力"야호~!"手势 + 韩式辣妹妆 + 文字泡泡 + 胶片质感。
features: **"야호~!" V手势**：手掌向前，拇指食指张开成大V形（gyaru claw pose），超广角近景让手稍显放大
**文字泡泡**：左上/右上空白区域添加 "OOO 야호~!" + 2-3个 "やっほ〜♡" 小贴纸
**韩式辣妹造型**：亮棕卷发、亮片眼妆、水晶美甲、露脐上衣+迷你裙
**街头真实感**：豹纹店面/粉色咖啡招牌，自然日光下拍摄，像朋友随手拍
**胶片相机质感**：轻微动态模糊、柔焦、颗粒感、日光高光
styles.prompt:
Transform the provided reference image into a cute, trendy, photorealistic K-gyaru street snap.

Preserve the original person's identity, facial likeness, natural expression, and realistic atmosphere. The image should look like a candid daytime photo taken by a friend on a Korean street, not a poster, cosplay, stage photo, or studio editorial.

The key pose is an energetic "Yaho!" greeting with a gyaru-style palm-forward V hand pose. The subject extends one hand toward the camera, palm facing forward, with the thumb and index finger spread wide into a large V/L-shaped gesture, similar to a playful gyaru claw pose. The other fingers are softly bent and visible. Use a close ultra-wide-angle perspective so the hand appears slightly enlarged in the foreground, while the smiling or playful winking face is naturally behind it. Make the long crystal nails, rings, fingers, and palm details clear, sharp, and natural.

Style the subject with a modern, wearable K-gyaru mood: glossy blonde-brown or warm ash-brown layered hair, soft waves, face-framing bangs, heart or star accessories, glitter eyeshadow, defined eyeliner, long lashes, bright under-eye makeup, pink blush, glossy lips, crystal nails, rings, hoop earrings, layered necklaces, heart pendant, chain details, cropped top, mini skirt, belt, and subtle fur or sparkling accents blended with trendy Korean street fashion.

Use a realistic daytime Korean street background: leopard-pattern storefront or poster wall, hot-pink café sign or fashion-shop exterior, or casual K-gyaru street snap atmosphere. Add soft natural light, urban reflections, pastel street colors, subtle bokeh, and casual street details.

Place the exact text "OOO 야호~!" clearly in the upper-left or upper-right empty space. It must be easy to find, accurately readable, and spelled exactly as "Clair 야호~!" Style it as a medium-sized cute SNS sticker caption with hot-pink bubble letters, white highlights, a subtle silver glitter outline, and small heart accents. Do not cover the face, extended hand, nails, or important body details. Add 2-3 small "やっほ〜♡" bubble stickers nearby, secondary to the main text.

Make the final image feel like a spontaneous compact film camera or disposable camera snapshot, with slight motion blur, soft focus, subtle film grain, realistic daylight highlights, natural skin texture, mild noise, sunlit street atmosphere, and a hot-pink, cute, confident, playful, sparkly mood.

Avoid: night lighting, dark neon atmosphere, unreadable or incorrect text, hidden text, extra fingers, deformed hands, hidden nails, covered face, oversized text, over-retouched skin, HDR look, stiff posing, costume-like styling, studio editorial look, or losing the reference likeness.

styles.name: Y2K酸性·ALL STARS 夜店潮流海报
styles.summary: Y2K酸性设计结合孟菲斯复古未来主义的夜店潮流活动海报，以3D充气软胶质感为核心视觉语言。
features: **色彩体系**：纯黑底色 + 亮蓝 + 暖橙 + 纯白的高饱和撞色
**材质工艺**：3D 膨胀充气软胶质感，C4D+Octane 渲染，均匀细腻的哑光颗粒肌理，圆润光滑的高光

**版式布局**：顶部品牌标识/热线信息 → 超大号粗体主标题「ALL STARS」→ 下半部分活动详情/日期/嘉宾名单
**文字风格**：现代无衬线字体，严格网格系统排版，文字层级清晰
**整体调性**：潮酷活泼、年轻化夜店氛围感，商业级活动海报质感

styles.name: Japanese Poetic Dreamy Semi-Realistic Illustration
styles.summary: 黄昏逆光下的诗意插画，暖金发丝光 + 深海蓝阴影，诗歌封面感的抒情氛围。
features: **光照**：黄昏逆光，金色夕阳从侧后方照射，形成强烈发丝光与轮廓光
**色彩**：高光暖金黄/奶油白/琥珀橙，阴影深海蓝/灰蓝/靛青，蓝橙冷暖对比
**质感**：柔焦、朦胧、轻微失焦，局部过曝、边缘泛光扩散

**风格定位**：不是摄影风，是诗歌封面感抒情插画
**主体塑造**：半写实插画，轮廓柔和，细节概括，重氛围和文学感

styles.summary: 超写实印尼传统美食信息图海报，电影感悬浮食材，现代信息图设计，适合展示印尼美食文化
features: **超写实印尼美食** — 8K DSLR 画质，超精细纹理
**电影感悬浮食材** — 光泽咖喱飞溅、新鲜香草、香料、蒸汽
**现代信息图设计** — 粗体标题、弯曲标签箭头指向食材
**丰富金色灯光** — 影棚灯光，专业高端氛围
**浅景深效果** — 专业美食摄影风格
styles.prompt:
超写实印尼传统美食信息图海报，8K DSLR 画质
竖版编辑布局，戏剧性但干净的背景
现代烹饪信息图设计：
- 顶部粗体标题显示菜品名称和产地（ASAL）
- 干净的印尼字体，带弯曲标签箭头指向食材
- 电影感的悬浮食材：光泽咖喱飞溅、新鲜香草、香料、碗中升起的蒸汽
- 超精细、光泽、诱人的纹理
- 丰富的金色影棚灯光，专业高端氛围
- 浅景深，专业美食摄影风格
不要水印，不要真实Logo，不要电商广告感，不要卡通风，不要拼贴感。

styles.name: 天使阶层海报（Hierarchy Angels Poster）
styles.summary: 宗教元素与朋克拼贴的碰撞，复古丝网印刷质感打造先锋艺术海报。
features: **丝网印刷质感** — 噪点杂色、半调图案还原复古印刷效果
**宗教朋克风格** — 古典天使线稿与未来几何字体融合
**多层次拼贴** — 中英文混合排版，符号与数字穿插
**宝蓝+黑色配色** — 神秘高级感，米白基底干净通透
styles.prompt: 大师级排版，极简主义，半调图案，噪点杂色，丝网印刷质感。 宗教朋克风拼贴海报，以米白为基底，宝蓝与黑色为主色调；核心是黑白线稿风格的吹号角的天使插画（翅膀、姿态具古典宗教感）；顶部文字"A HIERARCHY OF ANGELS IS A RANKING SYSTEM OF ANGELS..."，搭配未来感宝蓝几何字体"END OF LIFE"；画面穿插多组文字与符号：竖排宝蓝粗体字"HIERARCHY""SERVE"，黑色小字"BLESS UR ALL SERVANTS MY LORD""ANGELS CHARGE OF YOU TO PROTECT YOU IN ALL OF WAYS"，数字"841""7"，宝蓝艺术字体"DIVINE LIGHT""ORDERS""HOLY"，还有螺旋建筑小插画；整体融合古典宗教元素、朋克拼贴排版、赛博未来字体，带复古印刷的颗粒纹理，营造出宗教哲学与先锋艺术交织的思辨氛围。 左上角小字"POSTER DESIGN" 右下角极小字"NOFUN DESGIN"

styles.name: 异类阵列视觉
styles.summary: 阵列秩序中的唯一异类，概念海报的视觉焦点。
features: **高角度俯视构图** — 从正上方俯瞰，以俯视/鸟瞰视角构建场景，产生强烈的空间秩序感和平面图案感
**阵列重复** — 大量相同的群体对象以整齐、有秩序、近似阵列的方式分布，形成强烈的重复视觉节奏
**异类焦点** — 在阵列中心放置一个唯一不同的对象，在颜色、材质、方向、身份或状态上明显区别于周围群体
**编辑海报质感** — 真实质感与平面设计感结合，纸张颗粒、轻微胶片噪点、印刷质感、强烈阴影和高级色彩对比
**文字排版系统** — 下方巨大粗重块状中文标题，半透明叠加；上方黑色手写体年份「2026」；小号英文信息；底部英文标语
styles.prompt: 生成一张竖版 3:4 的成品概念海报。画面采用高角度俯视构图，主体是大量重复出现的{群体对象}，它们以整齐、有秩序、近似阵列的方式分布在{背景场地}上，形成强烈的重复感、秩序感和图案感。在画面中心放置一个唯一不同的{异类对象}。这个对象在颜色、材质、方向、身份或状态上明显区别于周围群体，成为画面视觉焦点。它象征异类、逆流、不合群、破局、反秩序。画面风格为现代编辑海报、概念艺术海报、社交媒体视觉海报。真实质感与平面设计感结合，有纸张颗粒、轻微胶片噪点、印刷质感、强烈阴影和高级色彩对比。画面下方加入巨大中文标题「{中文标题}」，字体为粗重块状字体，半透明叠加在画面上。标题上方叠加黑色手写风格年份「2026」。标题上方加入小号英文信息："AI VISUAL POSTER / CREATIVE SERIES"。底部加入英文标语：「{英文标语}」。文字必须清晰准确，不要乱码。不要水印，不要真实Logo，不要电商广告感，不要卡通风，不要拼贴感，不要复杂背景。

styles.name: 手绘旅行涂鸦插画
styles.scene: 旅行海报、目的地宣传、编辑插画、旅行杂志配图、手绘风社媒内容
styles.summary: 用黑色毡尖笔手绘感线条绘制旅行目的地插画，几乎纯黑白画面只用一种点缀色，像设计师旅行速写本上的即兴速写
features: **黑色毡尖笔手绘感** — 抖动线条、自然不完美、类似旅行笔记本上的速写，每一条线都明显是手工绘制
**黑白+单色点缀** — 几乎纯黑白画面，只用一种点缀色（如蓝色）点缀天空、水面、窗户等细节
**编辑式构图** — 开放轻松、留白充裕，像设计师的旅行速写本，元素自然重叠但不拥挤
**目的地标志性元素** — 标志性地标、特色建筑、当地交通、风土人情，捕捉目的地的精神而非写实
**极简扁平造型** — 扁平形状、最少内部细节，避免写实质感、渐变阴影、光泽表面
styles.prompt:
Create a charming editorial travel illustration of {目的地} in a simple hand-drawn doodled style, as if sketched by hand with a black felt-tip marker in a travel notebook. The illustration should feel personal, spontaneous, and imperfect rather than digitally designed. Think of the kind of drawing someone might casually create while sitting at a café after exploring the destination.

## COLOR PALETTE
Keep the illustration almost entirely black and white. Use only one accent color: {点缀色}

## STYLE
Draw entirely with black felt-tip pen lines. Use slightly wobbly hand-drawn contours, natural line variation, loose marker strokes, sketch-like confidence, subtle imperfections, slightly open line endings, uneven hand pressure, and occasional overlapping strokes. Every line should clearly look handmade. Avoid perfectly smooth curves, mechanically precise outlines, polished vector graphics, or overly crisp digital rendering.

## SUBJECT
Illustrate the unique atmosphere and instantly recognizable identity of {目的地} rather than producing a realistic cityscape. Select the destination's most iconic landmarks, characteristic architecture, local transportation, famous scenery, native plants, local animals, regional food, and cultural objects. Focus on the spirit of the destination instead of literal accuracy.

## COMPOSITION
Arrange the selected elements into a balanced editorial composition with generous white space. The layout should feel open, light, and effortless, similar to a designer's travel sketchbook. Allow objects to overlap naturally without becoming crowded. Every element should have room to breathe. Keep the composition visually relaxed and uncluttered. Apply the accent color sparingly to selected details such as water, sky, windows, signs, clothing accents, decorative highlights, or small architectural features. Never introduce any additional colors.

## DRAWING STYLE
Keep every object simple and intentionally simplified. Use flat shapes with minimal interior detail. Avoid realistic textures, gradients, shadows, painterly brushwork, glossy surfaces, or complex rendering. The illustration should remain clean, airy, understated, and highly graphic.

## LINE QUALITY
The black marker lines are the main visual feature. Lines should feel confident, casual, lively, expressive, and naturally imperfect. Maintain a consistent hand-drawn energy throughout the entire illustration.

Do not add text, labels, or typography. Do not use watermarks or logos. Do not make it look like a digital graphic or commercial advertisement.

styles.name: 半色调拼贴隐喻公益海报
styles.summary: 用一种可见的材质类别拼出另一种可辨识的象征性剪影，让材质本身成为叙事的载体。
features: **半色调印刷质感**：蓝绿色调半色调对象印在陈旧米纸上
**拼贴隐喻手法**：用一种材质拼出另一种象征性剪影（如塑料拼鱼、电子垃圾拼鸟）
**复古公益风格**：紧凑的红蓝 campaign 字体排版，老式版画线刻
**概念驱动**：概念 > 技法，一个能一句话讲清的视觉比喻比精细渲染更让人记住

styles.name: Grotesque Doodle Style - 怪诞手绘风插画
styles.summary: 怪诞手绘风：把照片变成彩铅+蜡笔+圆珠笔手绘插画，夸张表情但不丑化，保留灵魂辨识度。
features: 彩铅上色 + 蜡笔颗粒 + 圆珠笔线稿
重复描边 + 线条抖动 + 颜色不均匀
保留纸张纹理，像真实手工画
白色椭圆眼白 + 黑色小圆点眼珠
表情夸张但不丑化
米黄色/奶油色纸张背景
styles.prompt:
将上传照片重绘为「怪诞手绘风」人物/宠物插画。

核心目标：保留主体辨识度，保留原照片的表情、姿态、气质和主要特征。不要画成精致头像，不要过度美化，不要写实修图。重点是画出主体的性格、表情和生活瞬间。

【主体规则】
保留原主体的发型、毛色、脸型、五官、服装、姿态、体型和整体气质。可以适度漫画化变形，但必须一眼能认出原主体。

【眼睛硬性规则】
所有人物、动物和小涂鸦角色的眼睛都必须画成：白色椭圆眼球 + 黑色小圆点瞳孔。禁止真实眼睛、虹膜、美瞳、眼珠高光、动漫大眼。眼白必须明显多于瞳孔。

【表情规则】
表情必须基于上传照片本身进行夸张。先识别原照片里的真实表情，然后在原表情基础上漫画化放大。不要随机更换表情。

【嘴巴规则】
嘴巴是表情重点。保留原照片嘴部状态，但让它更有戏。允许：抿嘴、微撅、嘴角下垂、苦笑、发呆微张嘴、轻微露牙、香肠嘴。不要统一微笑。

【画风要求】
彩铅手绘。蜡笔质感。圆珠笔线稿。重复描边。线条略微凌乱。涂色不完全均匀。保留纸张纹理。像真实手工画出来的插画。不要数字插画质感。不要3D。不要油画。不要水彩精修。

【背景规则】
背景不要完全随机。优先从原照片中提取真实元素，并转成手绘涂鸦。如果原照片背景太杂、太暗、太乱，直接使用纯色背景：米黄色、奶油色、浅黄色、淡蓝色、浅粉色均可。

【最终效果】
第一眼：很像本人。第二眼：有点怪。第三眼：很好笑，很传神。整体真实、有趣、有性格，像把人物灵魂状态画出来。

styles.name: GPT Image 2 Playful Doodle Illustration
styles.summary: GPT Image 2 专属涂鸦插画风格指南：真实主体 + 手绘涂鸦互动 + 微观叙事 + 明亮配色。
features: 真实主体与手绘涂鸦融合
涂鸦元素与主体互动（触碰、拉拽、举起、反应）
微观叙事小故事
明亮 uplifting 光线，无硬阴影
干净整洁但有温度
styles.prompt:
Create a cheerful, creative composition that blends a realistic subject with 
playful hand-drawn doodles and a subtle micro-story.

Subject:
[insert object / person / product — keep simple and recognizable]

Layout:
- Invisible clean grid system underneath
- Balanced, airy spacing (avoid clutter)
- Clear hierarchy: subject first, doodles second, micro details third

Doodles:
- Playful, expressive, slightly exaggerated
- Include: smiley faces, stars, sparkles, arrows, motion lines, cute icons
- Doodles must INTERACT with the subject (touching, pulling, lifting, reacting)

Micro Story:
- Add a tiny, fun narrative (e.g., doodle characters using the object, reacting to it)
- Keep it subtle and discoverable on second glance

Typography:
- Friendly sans-serif + handwritten notes
- Casual tone (not serious, not corporate)
- Include small fun labels or thoughts

Color:
Base: white / soft cream
Ink: soft black / dark grey
Accents: 2–3 cheerful colors (yellow, sky blue, soft red, mint, etc.)

Lighting:
- Bright, soft, uplifting
- No harsh shadows

Style:
- Clean + playful + slightly imperfect
- Feels human, warm, and creative

Constraints:
- Do NOT overcrowd
- Every doodle must have purpose or interaction
- Keep subject clearly visible (no obstruction)
- Maintain breathing space

Mood: [cheerful / curious / lighthearted / imaginative]

styles.name: 东方花茶香氛海报
styles.summary: 柔焦栀子花与东方版式的融合，高级花茶香氛的成品海报。
features: **柔焦花卉摄影** — 花瓣为奶白色和淡象牙白，花心带浅黄色，枝叶为低饱和浅绿色。花朵以大面积柔焦铺陈，中央清晰、四周虚化，形成浅景深和梦境般的白色层次
**奶油白纸张质感** — 背景为温暖奶油白纸张，带细腻颗粒、柔光、淡黄晕染和轻微水彩感，整体清透、安静、东方
**完整排版系统** — 右侧竖排大号中文标题（书法宋体）、红色印章方印、右上小号中文描述、下方英文、左中部信息组、左下角说明文字
**高级品牌调性** — 东方花茶香氛海报，兼具柔焦花卉摄影的柔和感与平面设计的精致排版
**双语言信息层级** — 中文为主视觉标题，英文为辅助信息，信息组按视觉权重排列
styles.prompt:
生成一张竖版 3:4 的成品概念海报。画面主体是几朵柔焦{花卉题材}，花瓣为{花色描述}，花心带{花心颜色}，枝叶为{枝叶色调}。花朵以大面积柔焦方式铺在画面中，中央一朵清晰度最高，右下和背景花朵略微虚化，形成浅景深和梦境般的白色层次。

背景为温暖{纸张色调}纸张，带细腻颗粒、柔光、{晕染色调}晕染和轻微水彩感，整体清透、安静、{风格调性}。

版式必须完整：
- 画面右侧竖排大号中文标题写「{中文标题}」，黑灰色书法宋体
- 标题旁边加一个小红色印章感方印，印文为{印章文字}
- 右上角写小中文「{右上描述}」
- 下方英文写「{英文标题}」
- 左中部写信息组：「{信息组一} / {信息组二} / {信息组三}」
- 左下角写一段小中文说明：「{说明文字}」

视觉风格：{风格描述}海报、{主体元素}、柔焦{主体}摄影、香氛品牌视觉、奶油白留白、{辅助色调}柔光、{辅助色调}枝叶。

不要水印，不要真实Logo，不要电商广告感，不要卡通风，不要拼贴感，不要复杂背景，不要乱码。

styles.name: 未来生态春季插画KV
styles.summary: 巨型花园机械生命体 × 未来浪漫主义 × 春季万物生长 × 大透视商业插画KV。

极具张力的45度大透视构图
前中后景层次丰富（云海+花瓣+星球+晨曦）
高纯度色彩：蓝紫、青蓝、白、嫩粉、嫩绿

商业级海报张力，未来浪漫主义气质
styles.prompt: 未来生态春季插画海报KV，极具张力的大透视构图，画面右侧是一座巨型花园机械生命体，形态结合花朵、温室、未来机械舱与柔和有机曲线，主体巨大，占据画面六成以上，表面有发光玻璃、白色流线结构、透明舱体、嫩绿色能源核心，内部漂浮粉色云雾与春季植物能量，周围有小型探索角色在主体表面攀爬、维护、观察，左侧与前景由翻涌云海、花瓣洪流、彩色轨迹、漂浮立方体组成，形成强烈的前中后景层次，远处有巨大星球、光环、晨曦天空和空气透视，整体色彩采用高纯度{{蓝紫}}、{{青蓝}}、白色、{{嫩粉}}、{{嫩绿}}与少量{{橙黄}}点缀，插画语言夸张、明快、年轻，具备商业级海报张力，构图富有视觉爆发力和未来浪漫主义气质，强调春日万物生长、希望、启新、青春出发的感觉，64K高清画质，下方：主题用流动的毛笔手绘字体："{{主标题英文}}"，极小的装饰性小字，极细无衬线小字体"{{年份}}"，白色极细无衬线字体水印"{{品牌名}}"，质感，肌理感，梦幻的，耀变，反射，艺术抽象，诗意的，高级，杰作，极具视觉冲击力，获奖作品，大师级配色，大师级排版，高细节，高级感，创意线条排列背景，超高清，布局协调。

styles.name: Futuristic Editorial Collage Portrait
styles.summary: 未来主义编辑风格混媒肖像：半写实人像 + 几何拼贴 + 蓝图/报纸纹理 + 高端杂志排版。
features: 半写实人像肖像，超清晰面部细节、皮肤纹理、毛孔
几何分割构图、切片多边形平面、杂志裁剪
蓝图/技术图纸标注、建筑草图线条
多语言字体排版、报纸纹理、数据块
精致光影 + 编辑级照明
复杂的拼贴背景但不杂乱
styles.prompt:
Ultra-detailed futuristic editorial mixed-media portrait blending hyper-realistic digital collage aesthetics with precision geometric concept painting and avant-garde magazine design.

Anatomically accurate semi-realistic human portrait rendered with ultra-sharp facial detail, visible skin texture, pores, subtle imperfections, and smooth luminous tonal gradation.

Face illuminated with clean studio-style lighting and soft cinematic shadows, contrasted against fragmented architectural collage structures and layered graphic editorial elements.

Composition built from overlapping geometric segmentation, sliced polygonal planes, magazine cut-outs, newspaper textures, multilingual typography, technical annotations, blueprint-inspired drafting marks, and abstract deconstructed fragments.

Facial structure remains coherent while surrounding forms shift, overlap, and dissolve into controlled cubist fragmentation and cyberpunk editorial collage language.

Surface treatment combines polished painterly rendering with ultra-fine monoline engineering sketches, schematic contours, technical hatching, delicate architectural construction lines, halftone textures, print grain, ink overlays, and subtle compression artifacts.

Fine linear drafting details are embedded organically into facial anatomy, especially around eyes, cheekbones, jawline, neck, and upper body, gradually transitioning into expressive translucent painterly sweeps and layered abstract collage textures.

Typography integrated directly into the composition using bold editorial sans-serif layouts, dense newspaper-style microtext, vertical typographic arrangements, fragmented data blocks, blueprint notes, faint handwritten formulas, and diagrammatic symbols.

Text elements function as structural design components rather than readable focal points.

Color palette is sophisticated and cinematic:
- grayscale and neutral skin foundations
- vibrant accents: cobalt blue, mustard yellow, golden orange, deep red, muted teal, charcoal black, ivory, warm beige
- layered brown tonal modulation

Accent colors appear strategically within geometric planes, reflective surfaces, collage fragments, and typographic structures, creating strong visual rhythm without overwhelming the portrait.

Edges alternate between razor-sharp vector precision, clean polygonal segmentation, glossy reflective transitions, and rough torn-paper collage textures.

Lighting remains refined and editorial, balancing realistic skin reflections with flatter print-inspired illumination across graphic components.

Background designed as a complex yet elegant abstract mosaic of:
- blueprint aesthetics
- cyberpunk editorial collage
- technical diagrams
- translucent geometric overlays
- layered paper textures
- atmospheric gradients
- controlled mixed-media abstraction

Overall aesthetic merges:
- high-fashion editorial photography
- futuristic concept art
- precision engineering illustration
- contemporary digital collage
- cubist abstraction
- luxury avant-garde magazine poster design

Extremely intricate, cinematic, polished, experimental, and visually intelligent with a refined deconstructed identity.

styles.name: Fashion Editorial Visual System
styles.summary: 高端时尚编辑视觉系统：4种版式方向 × 品牌调性变量 = 杂志级品牌KV/海报/封面。
features: 4种版式方向可选
品牌调性变量驱动设计
杂志级摄影 + 精致排版
强负空间、优雅构图
高端品牌感，非电商感
styles.prompt:
Use this as a single-image prompt template.
If you want multiple images, generate each one separately. Do not merge them into one collage unless the chosen direction is specifically a lookbook collage spread.

Direction Type: [Giant typography campaign / Couture magazine cover / Accessories editorial page / Lookbook collage spread]
Brand Name: [BRAND]
Theme / Collection: [THEME]
Product / Focus: [PRODUCT OR SUBJECT]
Model: [MODEL DESCRIPTION or "no full model, product-focused"]
Brand Mood: [MINIMAL / QUIET LUXURY / MODERN / ROMANTIC / SHARP / COOL / SOFT / AVANT-GARDE]
Color Palette: [COLORS]
Main Headline: [HEADLINE]
Subheadline: [SUBHEADLINE]
Extra Small Text: [OPTIONAL SHORT TEXT]
Aspect Ratio: [9:16 / 4:5 / 3:4]

Create a high-end fashion editorial visual for [BRAND], based on the theme [THEME], with the focus on [PRODUCT OR SUBJECT]. The output should feel like a premium brand campaign / fashion magazine editorial / lookbook direction, with a strong sense of art direction, typography, layout, and brand mood. This is not a generic fixed template. The composition, typography, image styling, and layout should be designed around the brand mood: [BRAND MOOD]. Main colors should follow [COLOR PALETTE].

The visual style should be clean, elevated, editorial, premium, fashion-forward, and highly designed. Use realistic fashion photography aesthetics, refined lighting, strong negative space, elegant composition, and a clear hierarchy between image, typography, and white space. Keep the overall feeling magazine-like, brand-driven, and visually collectible.

Use [DIRECTION TYPE] as the layout structure:

If Giant typography campaign: create a bold editorial poster with oversized typography as a major visual element. Let the headline [HEADLINE] interact with the model or product. Use powerful type placement, strong composition, and a premium campaign feel.

If Couture magazine cover: create a refined fashion cover with a strong central figure or hero product, elegant masthead-style typography, and a polished couture editorial mood. Add a few short editorial text elements such as [SUBHEADLINE] and [EXTRA SMALL TEXT].

If Accessories editorial page: create a fashion accessories-focused editorial page featuring [PRODUCT OR SUBJECT], with a layout that feels like a premium magazine spread or branded product story. The product should be clearly featured, with elegant typography and supporting editorial text.

If Lookbook collage spread: create a stylish editorial collage layout using multiple fashion images within one page, arranged like a premium lookbook spread. Keep the collage controlled, minimal, and fashion-oriented, not messy. Use [HEADLINE] and [SUBHEADLINE] as the key editorial text.

Typography should feel intentional and premium. Use large elegant serif or fashion-style typography, with smaller supporting editorial text. Main headline: [HEADLINE]. Subheadline: [SUBHEADLINE]. Optional small text: [EXTRA SMALL TEXT]. Text should be clean and readable, and should support the visual instead of overpowering it.

If a model is included, use [MODEL DESCRIPTION] and style the fashion image to match the brand mood. The model should look editorial, believable, and premium, not like a generic commercial stock model. If the image is product-focused, make the product the hero and support it with strong layout and campaign styling.

The final image should look suitable for brand moodboards, campaign mockups, early brand concepts, editorial poster design, social media visuals, or lookbook exploration.

Avoid: cheap e-commerce look, template-looking layouts, cluttered composition, low-end poster design, excessive text, random decorations, childish styling, weak typography, stock-photo feeling, messy collage, cartoon look, unrealistic anatomy, deformed hands, distorted products, bad text rendering, and real copyrighted magazine logos.

Generate one finished image only in [ASPECT RATIO].

styles.name: 时尚 Campaign 排版海报
styles.summary: 高端时尚 campaign 排版海报：排版本身就是画面结构，超大字体 + 强视觉层级 + 品牌调性。
features: 排版成为画面结构，不只是装饰
超大字体 + 强视觉层级
编辑式构图 + 负空间
真实时尚摄影 + 精致打光
清晰的品牌调性
styles.prompt:
Create a 9:16 poster in 时尚 Campaign 排版海报 style.

Summary: 高端时尚 campaign 排版海报：排版本身就是画面结构，超大字体 + 强视觉层级 + 品牌调性。

Preserve these style anchors:
- **排版成为画面结构，不只是装饰**
- **超大字体 + 强视觉层级**
- **编辑式构图 + 负空间**
- **真实时尚摄影 + 精致打光**
- **清晰的品牌调性**

styles.name: 时尚摄影弓箭手
styles.summary: 极简白色摄影棚中，东亚女性弓箭手的时尚杂志大片——黑色风衣+复合弓，力量感动作 × 高端editorial排版。
features: **极简白色摄影棚**：干净背景突出人物与动作，高级感拉满
**全黑造型**：黑色长款风衣 + 黑色宽松长裤 + 黑色厚底皮靴，统一酷感
**黑色复合弓与箭**：道具与服装配色呼应，画面简洁有力
**多种力量姿势**：拉弓、回眸、行走、跳跃、单膝下蹲、高抬腿
**Bodoni/Didot 衬线排版**：标题如 NOIR ARCHER / MOTION DRAW / AIR CUT 等
styles.prompt:
极简白色摄影棚背景，一位成年东亚女性弓箭手，黑色长发微凌乱，穿黑色长款风衣、黑色宽松长裤、黑色厚底皮靴，手持黑色复合弓与箭，冷静专注的眼神，时尚杂志大片质感，动作有力量感

不同姿势：拉弓、回眸、行走、跳跃、单膝下蹲、高抬腿，身体比例自然，姿态流畅不别扭

Bodoni / Didot typography
标题如：NOIR ARCHER / MOTION DRAW / QUIET STEP / AIR CUT / CLOSER LOOK
小字排版：SILENCE. FOCUS. PRECISION. / EDITORIAL SERIES / STUDIO MODE

高端 editorial poster，minimal fashion photography，sharp details，soft studio lighting，high contrast black and white，clean composition，luxury magazine cover，vertical 4:5

Negative prompt: 身体畸形，手指错误，弓箭变形，脸崩，表情僵硬，比例失衡，多余肢体，文字乱码，低清晰度，过度AI感，背景杂乱

variables.IP形象: 参考图 + "Maintain IP identity and consistency throughout"

styles.name: 爆炸式美食信息图
styles.scene: 美食教程、食谱展示、产品广告、社交媒体分享
styles.summary: 超写实垂直分解的美食信息图，五层结构清晰分离，微距摄影质感，适合展示食物层次结构
features: **超写实垂直分解** — 五层结构清晰分离，每层悬浮带微妙阴影
**微距摄影质感** — DSLR 微距拍摄效果，纤维、气泡、谷物细节清晰
**柔光棚拍灯光** — 纯白背景，专业影棚灯光效果
**信息图标注** — 清晰的标签和指引线，适合教学展示
**8K 品质** — 高清分辨率，细节丰富
styles.prompt:
Create a hyperrealistic vertical exploded-view infographic of [FOOD] with 5 distinct layers:
1. TOP: Floating iconic particles, drips, crumbs, spices, steam, or decorative elements
2. SECOND: Separated top surface, glaze, sauce, outer layer showing rich textures
3. THIRD: Central food layer showing natural structure, depth, fibers, bubbles, grains
4. FOURTH: Base support, filling, shell, inner filling, clearly separated layers
5. BOTTOM: Simple plate, bowl, cup, or tray
Pure white background, soft studio lighting, each layer floating with subtle shadows
DSLR macro photography realism, clear infographic labels with fine guide lines
8K quality, premium editorial food photography style
不要水印，不要真实Logo，不要电商广告感，不要卡通风，不要拼贴感。

styles.name: Exaggerated 3D Toy Illustration
styles.summary: 夸张卡通角色（豆豆眼、小头大身子、超长四肢）+ 软橡胶/毛绒材质 + 高饱和多巴胺色 = 充满张力和喜剧感的3D玩具风插画。
features: 夸张卡通角色：小头、圆胖身体、超长四肢、超大手、超大字鞋
失衡重心，冻结在戏剧性跳跃姿态中
软雕塑玩具感：哑光软橡胶、毛绒面料、针织纹理、橡皮泥质感
高饱和多巴胺配色：大面积纯色块、强烈色彩对比
简洁白色背景 + 柔和椭圆阴影
漂浮抽象图形元素（星星、波浪线、球体、立方体）增强动感和设计感
柔和工作室灯光，全局照明，软阴影
styles.prompt:
A complete single 3D illustration, exaggerated artistic editorial illustration style, not storyboard, not a collage layout.

The subject is an exaggerated cartoon character with a tiny head, round chubby body, extremely elongated limbs, oversized hands and oversized shoes, off-balance center of gravity, frozen mid-air in a dramatic jumping pose, with strong tension and comedic energy. Overall form looks like a soft sculpture toy round, chunky, bouncy, exaggerated not anatomically correct.

Materials are matte soft rubber, fuzzy fabric, knitted texture, plasticine feel, with fine fiber details, slight grain, hand-sculpted touch avoid glossy plastic toy look, avoid translucent glass look, avoid high reflections.

High-saturation dopamine color palette, bold color clashes, large flat color blocks, bright but not over-glowing.

Clean white background, minimal space, only a soft oval shadow on the ground, no complex scene.

Floating abstract graphic elements around the character: stars, squiggle lines, balls, cubes, icons, symbols all rendered as soft rubber or paper props to enhance motion and design feel.

Soft studio lighting, global illumination, soft shadows, low contrast, clean commercial render.

C4D / Blender 3D illustration, stylized soft sculpture, matte clay material, fuzzy fabric texture, knitted surface detail, playful editorial 3D illustration, high quality.

Theme: [SUBJECT] floating with [PROP], surrounded by [ELEMENTS], hero illustration for [USE_CASE]

styles.name: Luxury Perspective Checkerboard Editorial
styles.summary: A high-fashion editorial poster style with low-angle luxury photography, sharp red-and-white checkerboard perspective planes, generous white space, oversized custom script typography, and restrained emerald or teal accents. It evokes international luxury maison advertising without copying any real brand mark, campaign, model, product, or exact layout.
features: Low-angle luxury editorial photography with a monumental subject scale.
Red-and-white checkerboard or tiled graphic plane in extreme perspective.
Large white negative space as the primary background field.
One oversized custom script word spanning behind the subject.
Small centered serif maison-style wordmark area near the upper field.
styles.prompt: Create a polished international luxury editorial poster in the Luxury Perspective Checkerboard Editorial style. Subject: {SUBJECT}. Action or presentation: {SUBJECT_ACTION}. Hero product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Location: {LOCATION}. Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Wardrobe and styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Typography: place the invented large script word "{MAIN_TEXT}" as an oversized sweeping background graphic behind the subject, and place the small uppercase editorial text "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" near the upper field; add the restrained accent symbol "{ACCENT_SYMBOL}" only once. Preserve these style fidelity anchors: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Avoid this source content: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Use a low-angle high-fashion photographic camera, crisp studio lighting, generous white space, a red-and-white checkerboard perspective plane, deep black structure, emerald or teal accent details, clean cutout subject edges, glossy premium material highlights, and sparse typography. Do not use any real brand logos, real fashion house names, monograms, watermarks, QR codes, social media UI, price labels, or copied campaign identities. Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

variables.`SUBJECT`: main model, product, or luxury subject
variables.`SUBJECT_ACTION`: main pose, movement, or product presentation
variables.`PRODUCT_OR_PROP`: luxury object, accessory, or hero prop
variables.`LOCATION`: minimal studio, runway, gallery, atelier, salon, or abstract luxury set
variables.`BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS`: checkerboard planes, white space, small accent marks, and secondary spatial details
variables.`MAIN_TEXT`: invented large script word used as a graphic field

styles.name: Sunlit Architectural Fashion Editorial
styles.summary: A polished outdoor high-fashion editorial photography style built from low-angle architectural framing, hard Mediterranean daylight, warm stone neutrals, elongated model silhouettes, restrained luxury styling, and fine graphic lines from wires, railings, shadows, or facade geometry. It recreates the premium fashion-campaign feeling without copying the original models, wardrobe, plaza, prop placement, or poses.
features: Outdoor luxury fashion editorial photography with believable high-end campaign realism.
Low camera position or slight wide-angle perspective that elongates legs, coats, and architectural scale.
Warm stone, concrete, plaster, or masonry surfaces used as large tactile foreground or side planes.
Hard sun, high sky exposure, crisp cast shadows, and a controlled warm lens flare or glint.
Elegant neutral palette led by ivory, sand, taupe, stone gray, black, camel, tobacco, and muted metallics.
styles.prompt: Create a polished outdoor high-fashion editorial photograph in the Sunlit Architectural Fashion Editorial style. Subject: {SUBJECT}. Pose or movement: {SUBJECT_ACTION}. Prop or accessory: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Location: {LOCATION}. Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Wardrobe and styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Internal editorial mood labels only, not visible text: {MAIN_TEXT}; {SECONDARY_TEXT}. Subtle photographic accent: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Preserve these style fidelity anchors: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Avoid this source content: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Use a low camera position, slight wide-angle fashion perspective, elongated silhouettes, hard Mediterranean daylight, bright pale sky, warm stone or plaster texture, crisp cast shadows, natural lens flare or glint, refined neutral color grading with black or tobacco anchors, visible fabric and leather detail, calm unsmiling luxury-campaign posture, and sparse premium props with no visible logos. Do not add overlay typography, watermarks, readable brand names, QR codes, social media UI, price tags, crowds, fantasy costumes, cartoon rendering, collage, vector graphics, or studio poster design. Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

variables.`SUBJECT`: main fashion model, pair of models, or editorial subject
variables.`SUBJECT_ACTION`: main pose, stance, gesture, or movement
variables.`PRODUCT_OR_PROP`: luxury accessory, travel object, sculptural object, or restrained prop
variables.`LOCATION`: architectural outdoor setting, plaza, gallery, resort, terminal, or civic facade
variables.`BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS`: secondary architecture, sky, wires, railings, shadows, texture, and depth cues
variables.`MAIN_TEXT`: internal editorial title or mood label, not visible as overlay text

styles.name: Sunlit Supermodel Nameplate Editorial
styles.summary: A warm analog fashion editorial poster style combining an outdoor supermodel photograph, lush foreground texture, a small material nameplate detail, and clean white lower-third title/caption typography.
features: Low-angle or seated outdoor fashion editorial composition with the model filling the middle third.
Warm direct sunlight, soft analog shadow rolloff, natural skin highlights, and slight film contrast.
Dense botanical or environmental foreground blur crossing the lower frame.
Shallow depth of field with garden, greenhouse, terrace, or coastal texture melting into bokeh.
Calm supermodel posture with elongated neck, relaxed hands, and composed expression.
styles.prompt: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} premium analog fashion editorial poster photograph. Subject: {SUBJECT}. Action and pose: {SUBJECT_ACTION}. Wardrobe and styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, with a small physical nameplate, plaque, tag, or engraved label integrated into the object. Location: {LOCATION}. Background and foreground details: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Preserve these style fidelity anchors: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Avoid this source content: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Use warm direct sunlight, shallow depth of field, foreground botanical or textile blur, slight film grain, soft analog shadows, tactile fabric and metal textures, relaxed luxury mood, and a close low editorial camera angle. Add clean white lower-third typography: large uppercase headline text reading "{MAIN_TEXT}" followed by the accent "{ACCENT_SYMBOL}", with a smaller white caption block reading "{SECONDARY_TEXT}". The typography should feel printed on a fashion magazine prompt-card poster, not like a watermark or app UI. Do not use real logos or real brand marks.

variables.`SUBJECT`: main supermodel or editorial fashion subject
variables.`SUBJECT_ACTION`: poised seated, reclining, leaning, or kneeling action
variables.`PRODUCT_OR_PROP`: luxury prop, case, chair, trunk, compact, garment detail, or object carrying a small material nameplate
variables.`LOCATION`: outdoor or greenhouse editorial environment
variables.`BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS`: botanical or environmental details that create soft foreground and background depth
variables.`MAIN_TEXT`: large lower-third editorial headline

styles.name: 东亚复古杂志风插画
styles.summary: 融合韩国传统美学与现代时尚，以韩纸质感、细腻线描、单种花卉主题和莫兰迪色系，将真人肖像转为优雅复古的东亚杂志风插画。
features: **保留真人面部特征**：以参考图为基础，保持面部比例、肤色、表情
**非直视镜头**：眼神柔和望向远方，带梦幻怀旧感
**单一花卉主题**：每次仅选一种花（芍药/山茶/梅/玉兰/莲等），超大白花围绕人物
**韩纸背景质感**：温暖做旧韩纸肌理，淡墨线描、水彩晕染
**韩服改良服装**：基于韩服元素（jeogori、chima、durumagi）+ 现代剪裁
**莫兰迪色调**：象牙白、奶油、淡薄荷、鼠尾草绿、米杏、柔桃 + 一处鲜艳点缀色
**细腻手绘感**：精致墨线、流畅轮廓、手绘纹理、柔和水彩阴影
styles.prompt:
Use the uploaded portrait images as the primary identity reference. Preserve the subject's real facial identity, facial proportions, calm expression, skin tone, natural features, and overall impression. Do not turn the subject into a different person.

Regardless of the gaze direction in the reference image, the subject must not look directly at the camera. The eyes should gaze softly into the distance, slightly away from the viewer, with a dreamy, wistful, calm expression.

Create a refined East Asian vintage magazine-style illustration of a graceful Korean woman, blending Korean traditional aesthetics with modern editorial fashion art. Place the subject in a poetic balanced composition with elegant negative space.

Randomly choose one natural variation for each element:
- hairstyle/accessory: choose a modern, soft, trendy hairstyle that suits the reference face, subtly inspired by Korean traditional aesthetics, such as softly parted hair, loose low chignon, natural half-up hair, simple braid, or relaxed low bun, with minimal accents like a slim binyeo, understated daenggi ribbon, tiny floral hairpin, or delicate norigae-inspired detail. Keep it contemporary, refined, and restrained; avoid ornate Chinese-style hairpieces or oversized decorative pins;
- botanical theme: select only one flower type per image from peony, camellia, plum blossom, magnolia, lotus, water lily, hibiscus, daisy, calendula, or wildflowers. Do not repeatedly default to the same flower type; each generation should feel like a different single-flower variation;
- pose/framing: three-quarter view, gentle side profile, seated pose, or close-up bust portrait with an averted gaze;
- outfit: choose a modern Korean hanbok-inspired outfit based on authentic Korean silhouettes, such as jeogori, chima, durumagi, baeja, layered jeogori jacket, ivory modern hanbok dress, pale mint layered jacket, muted peach blouse, sage-green editorial dress, or cream hanbok-inspired outfit. Include subtle goreum-like ribbons, soft collars, restrained embroidery, relaxed modern styling, and elegant fabric movement; avoid Chinese hanfu-style robes, wide translucent outer shawls, xianxia-style draped layers, fantasy sleeves, or non-Korean historical costume elements;
- accent color: deep crimson, jade green, royal blue, vermilion red, antique gold, or dark plum.

Use oversized botanical elements arranged organically around the figure, using only the selected single botanical theme for that image. Use delicate ink linework, clean fluid contours, subtle hand-drawn texture, soft watercolor shading, and a warm aged hanji paper background.

The outfit should include subtle hanbok-inspired details such as flowing sleeves, layered fabric, soft ribbons, embroidery, gentle collars, relaxed silhouettes, or elegant fabric movement.

Use a muted palette of ivory, cream, pale mint, sage green, faded beige, muted peach, dusty coral, warm gray, and soft brown ink tones, with one vivid accent color as the visual focal point.

The mood is graceful, nostalgic, fresh, poetic, quiet, and luxurious, like a high-end Korean art poster, luxury fashion magazine illustration, and modern East Asian botanical portrait. Keep the face elegant and recognizable.

No direct eye contact, no staring at the viewer, no front-facing passport-photo expression, no mixed-flower bouquet, no multiple flower species in one image, no repeated default flower choice, no Chinese hanfu-style robe, no xianxia-style costume, no wide translucent outer shawl, no fantasy draped layers, no ornate Chinese-style hairpieces, no oversized decorative pins, no text, no logo, no typography, no photorealism, no 3D, no glossy digital rendering, no harsh neon colors, no heavy anime style, no plastic skin, no excessive facial transformation, no idol-like face replacement.

variables.IP形象: 参考图 + "Maintain IP identity and consistency throughout"

styles.name: 东亚复古杂志风插画
styles.summary: 将真人肖像转化为韩纸质感的手绘插画，花卉环绕 + 莫兰迪色系 + 改良韩服，呈现高端东亚杂志美学。
features: **韩纸（Hanji）质感背景**：淡墨线描、水彩晕染、手工纹理
**花卉主题**：每次仅选一种花卉（芍药/山茶/玉兰/梅/莲等），围绕人物有机排布
**改良韩服造型**：jeogori/chima/durumagi 等韩服元素 × 现代时尚剪裁
**莫兰迪色系**：象牙白、奶油、淡薄荷、鼠尾草绿、米杏等柔和色调 + 一个鲜明点缀色
**禁止直视镜头**：眼神望向远方，营造诗意、怀旧、静谧的氛围

styles.name: 梦幻水彩旅行插画
styles.scene: 城市旅行宣传、文化活动海报、故事绘本封面、品牌文旅联名
styles.summary: 用高端故事书水彩风格描绘欧洲城市，兼具复古旅行海报的诗意与吉卜力童话的温馨
features: **梦幻水彩质感** — 柔和的蓝色水彩调，温暖奶油色纸张纹理，墨水轮廓精致勾勒
**故事书氛围** — 吉卜力工作室风格，碧翠丝·波特魅力，童话般的温馨氛围
**丰富场景细节** — 河畔长廊、古桥、花店咖啡馆、鹅卵石街道、历史建筑，充满生活气息
styles.prompt:
Create a dreamy watercolor travel illustration in the style of premium storybook and vintage travel poster.
The scene depicts the serene city of {城市名}, rendered in soft blue watercolor tones,
with delicate ink outlines, warm cream paper textures, and a cozy fairytale atmosphere.

At the top, a large hand-lettered watercolor calligraphy title: "{城市名}",
with a delicate small subtitle below: "{一句诗意标语}".

Scene elements: charming riverside or canal promenade, iconic landmarks in the background,
cobblestone streets, old bridges, historic buildings, flower shops, cozy cafes,
warm bakeries, vintage street lamps, soft reflections on calm water,
small boats, birds, blooming flowers, and soft clouds.

Foreground: cute illustrated characters enjoying daily life — walking and drinking coffee,
reading, sketching, cycling, walking dogs, couples on bridges,
children feeding birds, artists painting, and tourists taking photos.

Style: watercolor illustration, Studio Ghibli atmosphere, Beatrix Potter charm,
storybook style, European travel journal, high detail, 8K.
不要水印，不要真实Logo，不要电商广告感，不要卡通风，不要拼贴感。

styles.name: Mountain Trail Monster Doodle Poster Style
triggers: Mountain Trail Monster Doodle Poster Style
styles.summary: A candid outdoor hiking photograph remixed with a flat hand-drawn monster companion, oversized Spanish comic lettering, and loose sketch annotations, creating a playful adventure-poster collage.
features: Preserve the core visual identity: A candid outdoor hiking photograph remixed with a flat hand-drawn monster companion, oversized Spanish comic lettering, and loose sketch annotations, creating a playful adventure-poster collage.
Use BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS to control secondary scene details, textures, signage, props, and environmental cues.
Use a realistic candid outdoor hiking photograph as the base layer, with natural daylight, real mountain or trail detail, trees, sky, rocks, and a believable person in practical outdoor clothing.
Keep the person photographic and naturally integrated into the landscape.
Use off-white letter fill, black outline, yellow/red/cobalt offset shadows, light inner scribbles, uneven scale, and a playful Spanish travel-poster feeling.
styles.prompt:
Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in the "Mountain Trail Monster Doodle Poster" style.

Subject: {SUBJECT}.
Subject action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}.
Product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}.
Location: {LOCATION}.
Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}.
Main text: {MAIN_TEXT}.
Secondary text: {SECONDARY_TEXT}.
Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.
Wardrobe or visual styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Use a realistic candid outdoor hiking photograph as the base layer, with natural daylight, real mountain or trail detail, trees, sky, rocks, and a believable person in practical outdoor clothing. Keep the person photographic and naturally integrated into the landscape.

Overlay one flat hand-drawn red cartoon monster companion beside the person. The monster should have thick black contour lines, brick-red fill, simple dark red shadow shapes, oversized white eyes, tiny pupils, sharp white teeth, pale blue sweat drops, and simplified claw hands. Let one arm or claw physically interact with the person, backpack, bottle, map, trail sign, or prop.

Add oversized irregular comic lettering across the upper sky or mountain area. Use off-white letter fill, black outline, yellow/red/cobalt offset shadows, light inner scribbles, uneven scale, and a playful Spanish travel-poster feeling. Add a tiny handwritten note near the headline and a few sparse squiggles, arrows, underlines, or motion marks.

Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, realistic demon, horror, blood, violence, 3D mascot, plush toy, full cartoon background, corporate layout, minimalist typography, dense text, studio portrait, and low-detail mountains.

variables.`SUBJECT`: main hiker, traveler, athlete, explorer, or outdoor person
variables.`SUBJECT_ACTION`: standing, looking up, pausing, holding a bottle, checking a map, climbing, resting, or reacting to the cartoon companion
variables.`PRODUCT_OR_PROP`: water bottle, hiking pole, backpack, map, snack, camera, cap, or trail marker
variables.`LOCATION`: mountain trail, canyon overlook, alpine forest, cliff path, desert ridge, volcano trail, or scenic outdoor viewpoint
variables.`BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS`: distant cliffs, layered mountains, pine trees, blue sky, rocky ground, trail grass, shadows, and natural daylight
variables.`MAIN_TEXT`: large Spanish or playful comic headline integrated across the sky

styles.name: Backseat Transit Doodle Letter Poster Style
triggers: Backseat Transit Doodle Letter Poster Style
styles.summary: A realistic passenger-seat transport photo transformed into a high-energy travel poster with a central rear-view subject, electric yellow silhouette halo, oversized yellow-orange hand-drawn letters, comic rays, purple music marks, sticker icons, and cyan-white cloud swooshes.
features: Preserve the core visual identity: A realistic passenger-seat transport photo transformed into a high-energy travel poster with a central rear-view subject, electric yellow silhouette halo, oversized yellow-orange hand-drawn letters, comic rays, purple music marks, sticker icons, and cyan-white cloud swooshes.
Use BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS as the documentary background details and secondary context.

Use a realistic passenger-seat travel photo as the base layer: wide-angle backseat perspective, real vehicle interior, natural daylight through the windows, visible material texture, dashboard and window framing, and a believable road-trip or local transit moment.
Use golden yellow fills, orange shadow shapes, burnt brown outlines, and sticker-like flat 2D finish.
Use MAIN_TEXT as the large illustrated word integrated into the composition.
styles.prompt:
Create an image in backseat-transit-doodle-letter-poster-style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, inside or on {LOCATION}. Background details: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Style the subject with {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Use a realistic passenger-seat travel photo as the base layer: wide-angle backseat perspective, real vehicle interior, natural daylight through the windows, visible material texture, dashboard and window framing, and a believable road-trip or local transit moment.

Graphic overlay: trace the central subject with a thick electric yellow hand-drawn halo. Add oversized chunky hand-drawn letters spelling "{MAIN_TEXT}" around the subject, tilted and partly cropped by the frame. Use golden yellow fills, orange shadow shapes, burnt brown outlines, and sticker-like flat 2D finish.

Add {ACCENT_SYMBOL}, purple music marks, yellow comic speed rays from the corners, cyan-white cloud or wind swooshes along the lower frame, small sticker bubbles, and playful motion strokes. Keep the overlays bold but preserve the subject silhouette, steering gesture, and forward window view.

Text: use "{MAIN_TEXT}" as the large illustrated word. Add "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as tiny clean sticker text if it does not clutter the image. Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, app marks, copied brand logos, or copied jacket graphics.

variables.`SUBJECT`: main driver, rider, guide, commuter, musician, courier, or traveler seen from behind
variables.`SUBJECT_ACTION`: steering, tapping the horn, checking a mirror, pointing ahead, adjusting the radio, holding a map, or riding through the scene
variables.`PRODUCT_OR_PROP`: portable speaker, route card, camera, map, drink can, luggage tag, helmet, hand drum, ticket, or featured travel object
variables.`LOCATION`: tuk-tuk cabin, pedicab, tram, minibus, ferry deck, jeepney, taxi, cable car, shuttle, or compact city transport interior
variables.`BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS`: windshield view, side windows, textured roof, dashboard details, mirrors, small ornaments, road, market, harbor, hills, or city street outside
variables.`MAIN_TEXT`: short hand-drawn word such as AUTO, RIDE, GO, ZOOM, TAXI, JAM, ROLL, or DASH

styles.name: Cozy Bedroom Doodle Companion Snapshot Style
triggers: Cozy Bedroom Doodle Companion Snapshot Style
styles.summary: A candid low-light home photo style with a large flat 2D cushion-doll companion composited into the lower foreground, creating a quiet late-night creative diary mood with warm room texture, screen glow, and tiny handwritten doodle marks.
features: Preserve the core visual identity: A candid low-light home photo style with a large flat 2D cushion-doll companion composited into the lower foreground, creating a quiet late-night creative diary mood with warm room texture, screen glow, and tiny handwritten doodle marks.
Use BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS to control secondary scene details, textures, signage, props, and environmental cues.
Use DOODLE_COMPANION as a hand-drawn companion layered into the real room snapshot.
Use DOODLE_SCALE to set the companion scale relative to the subject and room objects.
Use LIGHT_SOURCE to preserve the snapshot lighting direction and warm room mood.
styles.prompt:
Create an image in the "Cozy Bedroom Doodle Companion Snapshot" style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}. Foreground prop or product: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Location: {LOCATION}. Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Main handwritten text: "{MAIN_TEXT}". Secondary handwritten text: "{SECONDARY_TEXT}". Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Wardrobe style: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Doodle companion: {DOODLE_COMPANION}. Doodle companion scale: {DOODLE_SCALE}. Light source: {LIGHT_SOURCE}.

Use a realistic candid phone-photo as the base layer. The scene should feel like a real late-night home interior with imperfect handheld framing, natural room clutter, warm practical light, visible fabric texture, wall grain, screen reflections, and mild low-light noise.

Composite one original flat 2D cushion-doll companion into the lower foreground or beside the main real-world object. The companion should have a rounded pillow body, pale fabric patch face, closed crescent eyes, tiny stitched mouth, simple mitten hands, blanket hood or scarf, dark hand-drawn outline, flat muted color fills, and a slightly pasted-on sticker finish. It should feel like a calm illustrated friend inside the real photo, not a 3D mascot.

The doodle companion scale is mandatory: make the companion a large foreground subject, not a tiny corner sticker. In 9:16, it should occupy roughly 35-45% of the frame. In 16:9, it should occupy roughly 28-38% of the frame. Let the companion enter from the left or lower-left edge and allow partial cropping by the frame edge while keeping the real-world object readable beside or behind it.

The companion identity is mandatory: make it a new cushion-doll design, not a human child and not the reference toy. Do not give it dark hair, a tan skin-tone face, a navy sweater, pajama pants, smiley slippers, or the same seated silhouette as the reference.

Add only a few tiny hand-drawn diary marks such as a sleep line, star, spark, breath mark, or small smile

variables.`SUBJECT`: main real-world person, object, or creative activity
variables.`SUBJECT_ACTION`: editing, sketching, reading, arranging notes, listening, watching, resting, or reaching
variables.`PRODUCT_OR_PROP`: laptop, tablet, sketchbook, notebook, headphones, mug, lamp, pillow, camera, or art tool
variables.`LOCATION`: bedroom, couch corner, dorm room, small studio, kitchen table, reading nook, or desk setup
variables.`BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS`: textured wall, bedding, posters, shelf, lamp, window, books, blankets, cables, plants, or soft clutter
variables.`MAIN_TEXT`: optional short handwritten diary note

styles.name: DIGITAL SOUL 数字灵魂海报
styles.summary: 荧光绿与黑色极端对比的先锋数字艺术海报，液态金属质感 3D 字母 + 破碎像素块 + 数据流。
features: 荧光绿与黑色极端对比配色
扭曲变形的 3D 字母，表面液态金属质感
周围散布破碎像素块和数据流
深邃黑色背景 + 霓虹绿色几何线条
底部小字展览信息文字
先锋前卫艺术风格
styles.prompt: "{{主题}}"主题海报，采用{{主色}}与{{辅色}}的极端对比。画面中央是{{主体描述}}，表面呈现{{质感}}，周围散布着{{装饰元素}}。背景是{{背景描述}}，点缀着{{点缀元素}}。底部有小字"{{底部文字1}}"和"{{底部文字2}}"，先锋前卫艺术风格。

features: 柔和扩散的色块 + 雾化边缘
胶片颗粒 + 印刷噪点质感
主标题清晰可读的高级编辑排版
有节奏感的设计留白
styles.prompt:
Create a 9:16 或 3:4 poster in 弥散风视觉海报 style.

Summary: 让颜色会呼吸，让文字有位置，让留白有节奏。

Preserve these style anchors:
- **柔和扩散的色块 + 雾化边缘**

- **有节奏感的设计留白**

styles.name: 妖魔孙悟空线绘
styles.summary: Adam Riches 风格妖魔化孙悟空，精密单线线条 + 巴洛克极繁主义，诡异华丽。
features: Adam Riches 风格精密单线线条
妖魔化孙悟空，琉璃圣体
巴洛克 + 极繁主义叙事
冷色调 + 华丽花纹质感
超广角构图，张力十足
镭射放射状闪光勾线及背景
styles.prompt:
Adam Riches风格作品，妖魔化孙悟空，精密线条，以单线连续线条绘画，让木炭在纸上游走成即兴的排线，他的线条时而密集，时而疏朗，构筑立体感，层层叠叠，这些看似无序的线条轨迹，最终重构出古典巴洛克风格与极繁主义叙事。
拟人国风雕，神秘感，华丽炫酷的花纹和质感、冷色调，整个画面散发出一种美轮美奂的诡异气质，惊艳迷人却又令人感觉到危险和恐惧，极致的细节刻画，极致的立体纹理，奢华、繁琐、恢弘、大气，超高清画质。妖魔化孙悟空，琉璃圣体。超广角构图，张力十足，压迫感，细节生动完美。极其震撼的一幕，视觉冲击力强，明暗对比强烈，阴影过渡自然，电影级构图，视觉冲击，8K画质，超清，极致细节，清晰的线条，高对比，大师级别的作品。立体渲染，精细画笔，色彩搭配和谐融洽，超细腻笔触，线条流畅，超清画质，完美品质，高质量，自适应饱和度，专业级打光，大师杰作，自由视角，阴影过渡自然，氛围感，高级感，唯美，宿命感拉满，画面具有层次感。视觉冲击，故事感，高级感，动态感。镭射放射状闪光勾线及背景。

styles.name: 暗黑国风奇幻插画
styles.summary: 暗黑氛围的国风奇幻插画，融合流光水彩油画与二次元半厚涂，笔触细腻带肌理，柔焦微闪叠加，摄影师级布光。
features: **流光水彩油画质感** — 水彩的流动感与油画的厚重肌理结合，笔触精细入微
**国风彩漫暗黑氛围** — 东方美学与怪诞融合，暗色雪夜架空场景，光暗对比强烈
**CG半厚涂 + 柔焦微闪** — 既有手绘温度又具数字绘画的光泽感，柔焦与微闪叠加
**电影感构图** — 广角镜头全景，电影慢镜头动态捕捉，层次分明

styles.name: 赛博朋克半调海报
styles.summary: 赛博朋克风极繁海报，亮红主色 + 黑白人物 + 多语言文字层叠 + 半调丝网印刷质感。
features: 亮红色（rgb(255,140,0)）主色调，高对比视觉冲击
黑白色调女孩人物（做旧卫衣、机械感帽子项链）
多语言文字信息层叠（LSHENG、LAOS 等巨型字母）
半调图案 + 丝网印刷质感 + 杂色纹理
重叠边缘色彩渐变，同位色渐变色系
点线面层次分布
街头文化与科幻风格融合
styles.prompt:
大师级排版，极繁主义，半调图案，杂色，丝网印刷质感。重叠边缘色彩渐变，同位色渐变色系，点线面层次分布。

构建赛博朋克风海报场景：背景以{{主色}}为主色调；主体是{{色调}}色调的{{人物形象}}（穿着{{服装描述}}，佩戴{{配饰描述}}）；画面布满多语言文字信息（如顶部"{{文字A}}""{{文字B}}"，侧边段落式字符，以及"{{文字A}}""{{文字B}}"等醒目字样）、巨型艺术化字母与细节元素，整体通过高对比色彩、文字与潮流视觉符号，营造出充满个性与未来感的赛博朋克氛围，突出街头文化与科幻风格的融合冲击。

styles.name: 温馨故事书咖啡馆
styles.summary: 将照片转化为温馨治愈的绘本风格咖啡馆插画，带有吉卜力般温暖童话感。

styles.name: Surreal Fish Doodle Landmark Photo Collage Style
triggers: Surreal Fish Doodle Landmark Photo Collage Style
styles.summary: A bright travel-photo collage style that overlays giant flat 2D cartoon travelers, fantastical folk-art fish, black marker loops, splash marks, and comic starbursts onto realistic landmark photography.
features: Preserve the core visual identity: A bright travel-photo collage style that overlays giant flat 2D cartoon travelers, fantastical folk-art fish, black marker loops, splash marks, and comic starbursts onto realistic landmark photography.
Photo base: use a realistic bright travel photograph with clear natural daylight, postcard-like scenic depth, readable sky and water or architecture, and a believable tourist-view perspective.
Illustration layer: overlay one oversized flat 2D illustrated subject across the foreground and middle ground.

The subject should look pasted or screen-printed on top of the photo, with opaque flat color fills, thick black hand-drawn outlines, simplified hands or face, exaggerated scale, playful anatomy, and bold graphic wardrobe colors.
Doodle layer: add ACCENT_SYMBOL plus loose black marker loops, ink starbursts, blue water drops, curved strings, short splash dashes, and motion ticks as an independent graphic layer.
styles.prompt:
Create an image in the "Surreal Fish Doodle Landmark Photo Collage" style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, using {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, at {LOCATION}. Include {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Wardrobe styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Photo base: use a realistic bright travel photograph with clear natural daylight, postcard-like scenic depth, readable sky and water or architecture, and a believable tourist-view perspective. Keep the landmark recognizable.

Illustration layer: overlay one oversized flat 2D illustrated subject across the foreground and middle ground. The subject should look pasted or screen-printed on top of the photo, with opaque flat color fills, thick black hand-drawn outlines, simplified hands or face, exaggerated scale, playful anatomy, and bold graphic wardrobe colors.

Creature layer: add two to five fantastical folk-art fish or flying fish around the main subject. Give them mismatched fins, wing-like shapes, round eyes, black tiger-like body stripes, red coral fins, cobalt-blue sections, yellow bodies, and simple black outlines. Let some creatures float in the sky, skim the waterline, or pass behind the main subject.

Doodle layer: add {ACCENT_SYMBOL} plus loose black marker loops, ink starbursts, blue water drops, curved strings, short splash dashes, and motion ticks as an independent graphic layer. Use these marks to create playful movement and connect the illustrated characters to the travel photo.

Text: keep typography minimal. If text is requested, use "{MAIN_TEXT}" only as a tiny hand-lettered travel note and "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as a sparse doodle label. Do not make large poster headlines.

Derive only the visual language from the style. Change the landmark, subject pose, outfit, props, and creature arrangement for every new image. Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, signatures, QR codes, platform marks, app UI, copied reference characters, exact reference poses, brand logos, readable brand marks, full

variables.`SUBJECT`: oversized illustrated traveler, guide, fisherman, skateboarder, courier, musician, or explorer
variables.`SUBJECT_ACTION`: leaning over a landmark, floating through the scene, pulling a stripe pole, balancing on a fish, chasing a creature, or bending around architecture
variables.`PRODUCT_OR_PROP`: painted hiking staff, fishing line, travel bag, map, snack, camera, kite string, ferry ticket, umbrella, or oversized pencil
variables.`LOCATION`: recognizable travel landmark, bridge, bay, harbor, canal, cliff road, mountain pass, plaza, or observation deck
variables.`BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS`: blue sky, water, landmark structure, distant city, boats, coastline, clouds, bridge cables, buildings, or tourist-view scenery
variables.`MAIN_TEXT`: optional tiny hand-lettered travel caption or none

styles.prompt:
Create a cinematic exploded-view advertising poster for {产品名称}. The product hovers in mid-air, decomposed into its individual layers — materials, ingredients, or components — floating apart to reveal the internal structure. Each layer is precisely rendered with accurate materials, textures, and finishes.

Cinematic lighting with dramatic shadows, deep dark background, strong negative space. The composition tells a visual story of craftsmanship and innovation, not a technical diagram.

For tech products: highlight chips, circuits, precision engineering. For food/beverage: showcase ingredients, layers, textures. For fashion/beauty: reveal fabric weave, material layers, product essence. For luxury: emphasize gold accents, premium materials, exquisite details.

Bold 3-character brand slogan at the bottom, clean typography.

Not a watermark, no real logos, no e-commerce clutter, no cartoon style, no collage feel, no busy backgrounds, no garbled text.

styles.name: Brand Miniature Architecture Poster Style
styles.summary: 把品牌产品包装放大成可运作的建筑空间，结合真实城市环境 + 微缩人物 = 超写实品牌微缩建筑摄影海报。
features: **概念**：品牌包装 = 建筑主体，产品成为可运作的空间
**比例**：2:3 竖版超写实微缩建筑摄影
**建筑逻辑**：入口、玻璃橱窗、室内功能区、露台、屋顶结构
**环境融合**：真实城市空间（街道、路灯、人行道、绿化等）
**人物叙事**：真实比例微缩人物，自然动作（排队、工作、取餐等）
**构图**：四分之三视角 + 轻微高角度，顶部留白给标题
**光影**：根据品牌色调设定，成熟精致写实
**排版**：左上区域白色简洁文字，无衬线字体
styles.prompt:
Please generate a vertical 2:3 ultra-realistic miniature architecture photography poster.

【Information】
Brand Name: [品牌名称，如 Starbucks]
Architectural Scene: [建筑功能，如 corner cafe]
Main Poster Title: [主标题]
Subtitle: [英文副标题]

[Visual Requirements]
The main subject of the image is a large "[产品包装]"，designed as a fully functional "[建筑场景]"，seamlessly integrated with the real urban environment. Maintain precise proportions of miniature model with ultra-realistic photographic quality.

[Main Design]
包装必须保留品牌识别特征：主色调、包装轮廓、Logo位置、材质细节、真实结构。包装逻辑转换为建筑空间：入口、玻璃橱窗、室内功能区、露台、地板、屋顶结构。

[Environmental Integration]
融入真实城市环境，包含街道拐角、人行道、斑马线、路灯、交通流、路边绿化等丰富细节。

[Characters and Narrative]
融入真实比例微缩人物，自然动作，包含顾客排队、店员工作、骑手取餐等场景。细节真实，避免玩偶感。

[Poster Composition]
2:3竖版构图，主建筑置于画面中下，顶部留白，四分之三视角+轻微高角度，背景浅景深柔焦。

[Lighting, Shadow, and Materials]
根据品牌色调设定光影，整体风格成熟精致写实。

[White Poster Text]
左上区域添加现代简洁白色文字，无衬线字体，排版考究。

[Style Keywords]
Hyper-realistic miniature architectural photography, authentic brand space, 2:3 commercial poster, building-as-giant-product-packaging, integration with real urban environments, macro photography, architectural model photography.

styles.name: Bold Monoline 品牌吉祥物插画
styles.summary: 以粗黑轮廓线 + 双色填充的丝网印刷风格，呈现品牌吉祥物的街潮插画，像印刷在帆布袋或T恤上的图案。
features: **粗轮廓线 + 双色极简** — 深炭黑 (#2B2B2B) 线条+填充 + 浅暖米白 (#F2F2F0) 纸张底色，仅用两色构建视觉，无渐变无阴影
**丝网印刷质感** — 深色填充区带细腻丝网印刷/孔版印刷颗粒感，浅色区有纸张纹理，还原传统 risograph 效果
**品牌吉祥物为中心** — 主体为品牌标志性角色/吉祥物，粗线条勾勒轮廓，深色填充 + 白色负空间细节，简洁有力
**正负形二色调** — 利用正负空间关系，深色填充部分镂空留白，形成强烈的图形识别度
**品牌文字小标签** — 品牌名以小型标签形式融入画面，不喧宾夺主，保持图形感
styles.prompt:
[BRAND NAME]. Act as a Senior Brand Illustrator, specializing in bold monoline streetwear character illustrations of brand mascots (style: bold-weight flat graphic, screen-print/risograph aesthetic, positive-negative two-tone illustration).

PHASE 1: BACKGROUND — 浅暖米色纸张背景 (#F2F2F0)，带细腻纸张纹理

PHASE 2: SUBJECT — BRAND MASCOT — Bold monoline 风格，{吉祥物描述}，粗轮廓线 + 深色填充 + 白色负空间细节

PHASE 3: TWO-COLOR ONLY — 深炭黑 (#2B2B2B) + 米白背景，无渐变，无中间色

PHASE 4: SCREEN-PRINT TEXTURE — 深色填充区有细腻丝网印刷质感

PHASE 5: TEXT — 品牌名「{品牌名}」以小标签形式融入画面右下或左下角

TECH SPECS: 8K分辨率，纯2D，无3D/光影/渐变

styles.name: 粗壮飘逸字体设计
styles.scene: 标题字体设计、品牌视觉、海报排版、创意文字
styles.summary: 粗壮宽阔的飘逸中文笔划，动感错位排列，文字挤压效果，纯色背景，扁平大师级字体设计
features: **粗壮宽阔笔划** — 飘逸文字笔划，粗壮有力，转折弧形柔和完美
**动感排列** — 文字排列极具动感，错位排列，视觉平衡之美
**文字挤压效果** — 文字间产生挤压感，增强视觉张力
**扁平大师风** — 扁平化处理，大师级作品质感
**纯色背景** — 纯色背景突出文字主体，画面简洁有力
styles.prompt:
Typography design for the Chinese characters "{主题文字}" and English "{ENGLISH_TEXT}".

Bold, broad, flowing Chinese character brush strokes with smooth curved transitions. Dynamic text arrangement with squeeze effects and misaligned text positioning, creating visual balance beauty. Flat style, master-level work quality.

Bottom center: small sans-serif text "{副标题}", below that even smaller text "{署名}".

Pure solid color background, clean composition, high-quality output. The text should dominate the frame with strong visual impact. Chinese characters are the main focus, English text as auxiliary element.

No watermarks, no complex backgrounds, no 3D effects, no gradients. Keep it flat, clean, and powerful.

styles.name: bloomberg_magazine
styles.summary: Bloomberg 商业杂志编辑视觉 + McKinsey 商业结构感 + MIT Technology Review 科技冷静感，生成有冲击力的商业杂志封面图。
features: 85% Bloomberg 商业杂志编辑视觉
10% McKinsey 商业结构感
5% MIT Technology Review 科技编辑气质
巨大主视觉标题 + 强烈商业编辑态度
精准核心视觉隐喻
高饱和色块或高对比版式
少量但有秩序的信息标签
文字与图形融合

styles.name: 高对比黑白字体肖像
styles.summary: 高对比黑白侧影剪影肖像海报，融合粗犷手写书法字与实验编辑排版风格。
features: **高对比黑白剪影** — 粗黑侧影轮廓搭配锐利负空间，粗糙墨迹边缘营造手工印刷感，碎片化镂空模板造型打破常规轮廓
**手写书法字体** — 超大潦草手写字嵌入颈部与身体区域，2-4 行大文字块与黑色剪影融为一体，如同纹身般自然
**编辑排印系统** — 细小微型编辑文字点缀，竖排排印元素作为装饰，底部图形设计 Logo 收尾，完整海报排版结构
**原墨印刷质感** — 米白色纸张背景，粗糙油墨边缘，不对称布局，裁切竖构图，实验编辑海报设计美学
**极简高冲击** — 仅黑白两色，以强烈的明暗对比和正负形空间打造视觉冲击力
styles.prompt: High-contrast black and white typographic portrait poster of {人物对象}, shown in side profile with {人物特征}. Build the portrait with bold black silhouette blocks, sharp negative space, rough ink edges, fragmented stencil shapes, tiny editorial microtext, vertical typographic accents and expressive hand-drawn calligraphic marks. Integrate one large readable text block saying "{文字内容}" in 2 to 4 stacked lines, placed only inside the neck and body area, using oversized scribbled lettering that feels fused into the silhouette. Include a graphic design logo reading "{Logo文字}" near the footer. Minimal off-white paper background, asymmetrical layout, cropped vertical composition, experimental editorial poster design, raw ink print texture, aspect ratio 4:5.

styles.name: Multi-Color Beverage Splash Ad System Style
triggers: Multi-Color Beverage Splash Ad System Style
styles.summary: A reusable beverage launch advertising system with four color-varied templates, built from giant white 3D typography, a diagonal hero drink pack, frozen liquid motion, dense launch-ad copy, and polished commercial product lighting.
features: Each case uses one strong drink-category color system rather than a generic rainbow palette.
Large white extruded block letters remain the main background architecture.
The drink pack is the single close-up hero object, angled diagonally and cropped with impact.
Splash, foam, ice, bubbles, or condensation are frozen in high-speed product-ad lighting.
Typography is bold, condensed, italic, mostly white, and stacked into tight ad-copy blocks.
styles.prompt: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} beverage launch advertisement in the Multi-Color Beverage Splash Ad System style for {PRODUCT_CATEGORY} and {DELIVERY_FORMAT}. Preserve these style anchors: one strong drink-category color system; giant white extruded block-letter architecture behind the product; one large diagonal fictional beverage pack cropped close near center; frozen splash, foam, ice, bubbles, condensation, or liquid sheets across the foreground; bold condensed italic white stacked headline typography; polished studio beverage lighting with crisp highlights; dense retail-ad layout with strong product hierarchy; delivery-context cues that stay secondary to the hero drink. Use {PRIMARY_COLOR} as the dominant field and {SECONDARY_COLOR} for shadows, side planes, liquid tint, or packaging accents. Replace all source content. Do not use Sprite, Coca-Cola, copied Korean text, copied Z/E/R/O layout, original green can, existing beverage logo, real brand name, watermark, QR code, legal microcopy, or exact source slogan. New content: {SUBJECT} is {SUBJECT_ACTION} with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP} in {LOCATION}. Background details: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Main headline text: {MAIN_TEXT}. Secondary supporting text: {SECONDARY_TEXT}. Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Styling direction: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Adapt the composition to {ASPECT_RATIO}: 9:16 should feel usable as a vertical store poster, fridge sticker, or Xiaohongshu cover; 16:9 should feel usable as a subway lightbox, brand launch KV, or supermarket display backdrop. Use photoreal commercial beverage retouching, transparent frozen liquid motion, glossy cold surfaces, crisp contrast, and a fresh kinetic launch-ad mood.

variables.`SUBJECT`: main subject
variables.`SUBJECT_ACTION`: main action
variables.`PRODUCT_OR_PROP`: object, product, or prop
variables.`LOCATION`: environment or setting
variables.`BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS`: secondary scene details
variables.`MAIN_TEXT`: main headline or graphic text

styles.name: avantgarde_bw_poster - 黑白灰先锋海报
styles.summary: 克制、秩序、先锋 —— 不追求信息密度，用极简几何和字体排版制造视觉张力。
features: **黑白灰层次丰富**：至少4种灰度层次，纯黑、暗灰、中灰、浅灰、白色交替
**随机字体排版**：巨型横排/竖排/横竖混排/靠边/居中/压底/分散式等多种方向
**随机几何母题**：从20+种几何元素中随机选择2-4种组合
**6大几何家族**：圆形家族、线性家族、块面家族、空间家族、网格纹理、结构符号
**极简强调色**：只使用1种颜色，1-2处，面积不超过画面2%
**10种构图骨架**：中央/上下错层/斜向/环绕/四角张力/满版字体/极端留白/垂直轴/水平轴/分散式
**克制信息量**：不能变成杂志目录，追求秩序和结构

styles.name: 3D运动赛事海报
styles.scene: 体育赛事海报、运动会宣传、电竞活动、品牌联名运动主题
styles.summary: 3D卡通运动员 + 写实体育场背景 + 双色标题 + 红橙图形斜线， Pixar质感运动赛事海报
features: **3D卡通运动员** — 夸张比例、大头、粗壮肌肉、红脸蛋、坚定表情，Pixar/DreamWorks质感
**写实3D体育场背景** — 真实观众、专业灯光、湿润反光地面，与卡通角色形成对比

styles.prompt:
Create a 16:9 horizontal 3D sports event poster.

Style rules:
- Character: 3D CGI cartoon athlete with exaggerated proportions — oversized head, stocky muscular build, flushed red cheeks, fierce/determined expression. Quality: Pixar/DreamWorks/AAA mobile game cutscene. NOT realistic.
- Character outfit: deep purple + neon lime green — MUST match title typography colors exactly.
- Background: photorealistic 3D stadium — real-feeling crowd, professional arena lighting, wet reflective surfaces, official event signage. Realistic render quality (deliberate contrast with cartoon character).
- Title: 2 words, fills upper portion — WORD 1 in deep purple, WORD 2 in neon lime/chartreuse. Bold condensed italic display type. Character appears BEHIND title letters, title appears IN FRONT OF background stadium.
- Depth order: [back] realistic stadium → title text → cartoon character → sport prop extreme foreground [front]
- Graphic slashes: bold diagonal red-orange 2D graphic streaks layered into the 3D scene — 2-3 slashes per image
- Foreground prop: sport equipment at extreme close range, larger than character's head — motion blur
- Sub-brand label: lower right — white bold condensed text on orange-red diagonal stripe chevron
- Color system: 3 colors only — deep purple + neon lime green + red-orange. Purple+green shared by character AND title. Orange-red = graphic accent + label only.

Scene: {sport} — {character} in action with {foreground_prop}.
Title: "{title}"
Sub-brand: "{sub_brand}"

Negative: realistic human athlete, fully cartoon environment, flat text overlay on top of everything, neutral color palette, static standing pose.
